# agentswarm

> CEO orchestration for AI agent swarms. Define VP roles in a swarm.yaml, deploy each

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): CEO orchestration for AI agent swarms. Define VP roles in a swarm.yaml, deploy each
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): > How agents (and contributors) operate inside this repo. agentswarm is the CEO layer
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): > Forged from Energy via harness-forge (CP103). One repo = one recursively self-improving
- [QUICKSTART.md](QUICKSTART.md): agentswarm is the CEO layer for AI agent swarms: define VP roles in a swarm.yaml, deploy

## Notes

- This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) so AI agents can
  discover this repo's docs without scraping. Generated from the README + key docs.
